data.title: Coin98 Super Wallet officially launches perpetual contract trading function supported by Orderly
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Coin98 Super Wallet announced the official launch of the perpetual contract trading function supported by Orderly.
It is reported that Coin98 Super Wallet has covered more than 170 countries around the world and reached more than 10 million users. Currently, users can use Coin98 Super Wallet to conduct perpetual contract trading services on dozens of chains.

data.title: Bernstein: Bitcoin shows strong resilience, institutional adoption will make Bitcoin more robust
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Brokerage Bernstein said that Bitcoin has shown strong resilience, especially in the recent market chaos, with a 26% drop, which is smaller than the past 50-70% crash, indicating strong demand. Tariffs have hurt Bitcoin mining companies, but US alternatives and artificial intelligence opportunities have provided support. Bitcoin still behaves like a technology stock rather than gold, but at the close of the market, Bitcoin can act as a liquid risk asset. In the long run, Bitcoin is very much like a more volatile and liquid version of gold (about $2 trillion, while the gold market is $20 trillion). 
Institutional adoption through ETFs and corporate bonds (10% of the supply) makes Bitcoin more robust, and although Bitcoin has fallen 15% year-to-date, ETF inflows remain positive, and selling pressure comes mainly from short-term traders.

data.title: U.S. Treasury Secretary Bensont denies urging Trump to change message on tariffs
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: U.S. Treasury Secretary Bessant said the Trump administration is open to reaching an agreement on reducing tariffs and denied that the market sell-off caused the White House to change its approach. There are reports that Bessant visited Trump in Florida over the weekend and urged him to change his message about tariffs, which Bessant denied. "I would say that the negotiations are the result of a large number of calls coming in to negotiate," he said. "This has nothing to do with the market." Bessant said: "I think you will see some countries with huge trade deficits stand up soon." "If they come to the negotiating table with solid proposals, I think we can eventually reach some good agreements." Bessant added that even if an agreement is reached, some tariffs may remain unchanged. (Jinshi)

data.title: Standard Chartered: XRP could reach $12.5 before Trump's presidency ends
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: A report on Ripple-related tokens released by Standard Chartered Bank stated that XRP could rise to $12.50 before President Trump leaves office. Standard Chartered Bank predicts that XRP will reach $5.50 by the end of this year, $8 by the end of 2026, $10.40 by the end of 2027, and $12.50 by the end of 2028. (CoinDesk)

data.title: DOJ shutters crypto crime fighting division, calls unit a ‘reckless strategy’ from Biden’s admin: Fortune
data.description:
The DOJ closed a crypto hit squad established by Biden's government as agencies align with President's Trump pro-blockchain administration.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/349978/doj-shutters-crypto-crime-fighting-division-calls-unit-a-reckless-strategy-from-bidens-admin-fortune?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: U.S. Tariff Strategy Aims to Revitalize Domestic Employment
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, U.S. Treasury Secretary Besent stated in an interview with CNBC that the United States is increasing tariffs on several countries as part of a reciprocal tariff strategy. The goal is to bring trade partners back to the negotiating table and restore jobs to the United States.

Besent explained, "By erecting a tariff wall, the ultimate aim is to bring jobs back to the U.S. However, in the meantime, we will impose significant tariffs." He added, "If we succeed, tariffs will eventually diminish like a melting ice block. As manufacturing facilities are established in the U.S., revenue will be generated, and as tariffs decrease, we will begin to collect taxes from new industries through payroll taxes. There should be a certain level of symmetry between these two aspects."

data.title: U.S. Department of Justice Disbands National Cryptocurrency Enforcement Team
data.description: According to BlockBeats, market reports indicate that the U.S. Department of Justice has disbanded its National Cryptocurrency Enforcement Team. This decision marks a significant shift in the department's approach to handling cryptocurrency-related investigations and enforcement actions. The move comes amid ongoing discussions about the regulation and oversight of digital currencies in the United States.

data.title: Crypto dining app Blackbird completes $50 million Series B financing, led by Spark Capital
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Crypto catering app Blackbird has completed a $50 million Series B financing round, led by Spark Capital, with participation from Coinbase, a16z crypto, Union Square Ventures and Amex Ventures. The company's founder Ben Leventhal said he raised the money in the fourth quarter of 2024, but only disclosed it recently, and he refused to disclose the implied valuation of the round. Since 2022, Blackbird has raised a total of $85 million. (Fortune)

data.title: Crypto payment app Lyzi completes seed round of financing of approximately US$1.4 million, with participation from Astek founder Jean-Luc Bernard and others
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Crypto payment application Lyzi has completed a seed round of financing of approximately US$1.4 million, with participation from Astek founder Jean-Luc Bernard and Dfns founder Christopher Grilhault des Fontaines. Lyzi is built on the Tezos layer 1 blockchain, allowing consumers to use cryptocurrencies for daily payments in retail and e-commerce environments, merchants to receive payments in cryptocurrencies, and deposit fiat currencies directly into their bank accounts. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Bubblemaps: 50 million MELANIA tokens have been transferred from the community fund and partially sold
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Bubblemaps, an on-chain data visualization platform, posted on the X platform early this morning that 50 million MELANIA tokens (worth $30 million) have been transferred from the community fund and partially sold, and the team has not responded to this. Bubblemaps added that addresses associated with the Melania team currently hold 92% of the MELANIA token supply.
